title: Leetcode 249. Group Shifted Strings
shortDescription: Group strings that are equivalent under a uniform alphabetical shift (e.g., "abc" → "bcd", with wrap-around) by identifying a shift-invariant signature for each string and grouping those with the same signature.

Leetcode 249. Group Shifted Strings

Group strings that are equivalent under a uniform alphabetical shift (e.g., "abc" → "bcd", with wrap-around) by identifying a shift-invariant signature for each string and grouping those with the same signature.

Asked at:

Meta

Google
